_description: Schema for financial agent output per portfolio company. All null values mean data not yet collected or not available. This schema is used by financial_agent_outputs.csv and the extract_financials_from_reports_prompt.md workflow.
_non_hallucination_rule: Do not fill any field with an estimated or fabricated value. Use null if unknown. Use 'TO BE COLLECTED' in string fields if data is missing but expected.

market_performance._benchmark: EXW1.DE (iShares STOXX Europe 600 ETF — proxy for STOXX 600)

profitability._note: For banks and insurers, replace EBIT/EBITDA with NIM, combined ratio, SCR coverage

balance_sheet._note: Net debt = total financial debt minus cash. Negative = net cash position.

valuation._note: Valuation multiples to be collected from financial terminal or annual report

sector_specific._note: Complete sector-specific fields for CJ2, SOAN, 2NN, IGQ5. Leave null for other sectors.

scoring._score_range: 0-100, higher is better, relative within this universe only

portfolio_decision._note: Human review is always required. This schema output is a tool for ranking, not a final decision.

audit._non_hallucination_confirmation: All values in this output are sourced from files listed in source_files or marked null. No values have been estimated or fabricated.
